The '''''Firestorm''''' was an [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] which became the [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]] of [[Supreme Warlord]] [[Blitzer Harrsk|Harrsk's]] fleet after the destruction of the [[Shockwave (Imperial-class)|''Shockwave'']].

==History==
It was turned over to [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Natasi Daala|Daala]] who led the ship in an attack on [[High Admiral]] [[Treuten Teradoc]]. Later it was assigned to [[Gilad Pellaeon/Legends|Gilad Pellaeon]] during the [[Assault on Yavin 4]], and it was on the ''Firestorm'' that Daala turned over control of the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] to Pellaeon.

==Appearances==
*[[Darksaber (novel)|''Darksaber'']] {{1st}}
